title: Better Spectator Freecam
body:
⚠️ IMPORTANT: USAGE GUIDELINES
If you're planning to use this on a server or modpack,
please refer to:
https://gamedash43.github.io/dash-mcl-licenses/#usage

![Title Text "Better Freecam"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c98ed821a5277e63441838542ff8862ab7e776f1.png)

Better Spectator Freecam is a datapack that adds survival and creative freecam functionality via spectator mode.

## 🛫 Usage
- **Command:** `/trigger freecam`
- **Effect:** Saves your return point and enters spectator mode.
- **Set Duration:** `/trigger freecam set [seconds]`
  - *Example:* `/trigger freecam set 10` sets freecam for 10 seconds.


## 🏃 Movement Limits
- **Range:** 192 blocks from your return point.
- **Restrictions:** 
  - Cannot enter when falling.
  - Cannot enter in survival mode near hostile mobs.

## ⚙️ Configuration
- **File Location:** `data/dash.freecam/function/config.mcfunction`
- **Options:**
  - Night vision in spectator mode
  - Conduit power
  - Blindness when inside solid blocks
  - Particle marker for spectator players
- **Uninstallation:** Run `/function dash.freecam:uninstall` to uninstall the datapack.

## ⭐ What Makes It Different?
- Uses a subsequent ID system supporting over **2,000,000,000 concurrent players**.
- Includes distance and hostile monster checks.
- Full modded and custom dimension support
